docs.text: SAJJ Documentation Welcome to the official documentation for SAJJ , an AI-powered personal fashion companion designed to help users make smarter styling decisions using artificial intelligence, personalized recommendations, and wardrobe intelligence. Unlike traditional fashion applications that prioritize shopping, SAJJ focuses on helping users maximize the value of the clothes they already own. By combining a digital wardrobe, AI-powered outfit generation, personalized style profiling, and intelligent shopping recommendations, SAJJ aims to become every user's personal stylist. Product Vision To empower users to dress confidently by providing intelligent, personalized fashion recommendations based on their wardrobe, preferences, body type, lifestyle, and occasion. Problem Statement Modern fashion platforms primarily focus on selling clothing rather than helping users style what they already own. As a result, users often struggle with outfit planning, repeatedly purchase similar clothing, and fail to maximize their existing wardrobe. SAJJ addresses these challenges by creating an AI-powered ecosystem that helps users organize their wardrobe, generate personalized outfits, discover new styles, and make informed purchasing decisions only when necessary. Core Product Pillars SAJJ is built around three core pillars: 👤 Personalization Understand the user through onboarding, style profiling, body type, preferences, budget, and lifestyle. 👕 Digital Wardrobe Build a structured inventory of the user's clothing using AI-powered image recognition and wardrobe analytics. ✨ AI Styling Generate personalized outfit recommendations using wardrobe data, user preferences, weather, occasion, and fashion intelligence. Documentation Structure This documentation is organized into the following sections: Product Overview Problem Statement & Vision User Personas User Journey Functional Requirements System Architecture Module Documentation AI Recommendation Engine Database Design API Documentation Development Roadmap Future Scope High-Level Architecture User │ ┌───────────┴───────────┐ │ │ User Profile Digital Wardrobe │ │ └───────────┬───────────┘ │ AI Recommendation Engine │ ┌───────────────┼────────────────┐ │ │ │ Outfit Engine Shopping Engine Discover Engine │ Application UI Application Modules The application is organized into the following functional modules: Authentication Onboarding Dashboard Wardrobe AI Stylist Outfit Engine Discover Profile Settings Future modules include: Shopping Community Virtual Try-On Marketplace Development Philosophy Rather than building isolated features, SAJJ is designed around modular architecture. Every feature is powered by three foundational systems: User Profile Digital Wardrobe AI Recommendation Engine This architecture ensures scalability while allowing future capabilities such as virtual try-on, influencer recommendations, community features, shopping integration, and advanced AI styling to be added without restructuring the application. MVP Scope Version 1 focuses on delivering the core styling experience: User Authentication Style Onboarding Digital Wardrobe Dashboard AI Outfit Generation Weather & Occasion Styling Outfit History Profile & Preferences Advanced capabilities such as Virtual Try-On, Community, Marketplace, and AI Body Measurement are planned for future releases. Document Version Project: SAJJ Version: 1.0 (Ideation) Status: Product Planning & Architecture Design
